raw_text:
Looking at the diff, the changes are:

1. Added documentation examples to the `escape` function
2. Modified the `escape` function to also escape `{` and `}` characters (added `| '{' | '}'` to the match arm)

None of the FACTS reference `crates/globset/src/lib.rs` - they all reference other files like `crates/regex/`, `crates/matcher/`, `crates/printer/`, `crates/core/`, `crates/searcher/`, `crates/pcre2/`, `crates/cli/`. The diff only modifies `crates/globset/src/lib.rs`.

Therefore, all facts are unaffected by this change.

The diff only changes the Homebrew formula file (`pkg/brew/ripgrep-bin.rb`), updating the version number and SHA256 checksums. None of the facts reference this file - they all reference source code files in `crates/`. Therefore, all facts are unaffected by this change.
